info.hindI_arTa: laq0AI karanA yudDa karanA saMgrAma karanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'AdityaM vosanasaM vA'vasTAya prayoDayet' (ASva॰gf॰3.12.16) prayoDayet=yudDamAraBeta praSabda AdikarmaRi
'SUrA iva prayuDaH prota yuyuDuH' (f॰5.59.5) ukto'rTaH
'senAmuKe prayudDAnAM BImaseno Bavizyati' (BA॰u॰58.23) prayudDAnAM yuDyamAnAnAm
'tena cAhaM na Sakto'smi saMyodDam' (rA॰1.22.22) saMyodDam=saha yodDum
'yadA prahfzwaH samrAw tvAM saMyoDayati kuYjarEH' (BA॰vi॰19.5)
'bAhuByAM samprayuDyasva yadi tvaM yodDumAgataH' (rA0 66531) yudDamAraBasvetyarTaH
'yO tO karRaSca BImaSca samprayudDO mahAbalO' (BA0 droRa 0 1313) samprAharetAmityAha
'samprayudDo DanuzkowyA kOnteyaH paravIrahA' (BA0 vana 3950) samprayudDaH=yodDumArabDaH
'yaH krudDamAyotsyasi' (BA0 vana0 2687) upasargavaSAtsakarmako'tra yuDiH
'na raTinaH pAdacAramAyoDayanti' (uttara0 5 candraketUktiH)
'ye ca kecinniyotsyanti samAjezu niyoDakAH' (BA0 vi0 27) niyotsyanti niyotsyante sannikfzya saMpraharizyante bAhUbAhavi yotsyanta ityarTaH
'dvandvayudDena ca mayA sAkameva niyuDyate' (kaTA0 38132) ukto'rTaH
'tizWedAnIM susannadDo niyudDe nAsti matsamaH' (maDyama0) niyudDaM dvandvaM mallayudDam
'niyoDakASca deSeByaH samezyanti mahAbalAH' (BA0 Adi0 18413) niyoDakA mallAH
'tA (prajAH) asmA udavAyoDaMstAsAM manyumavASfRAt' ( ) udayoDan=udayuDyanta saMprajihIrzayA kroDaprayuktA vA samAsadan
'udyoDantyaBi valganti taptAH Penamasyanti bahulAMSca bindUn' (aTarva0 12329) Apa iti SezaH udyoDanti udyuDyante Urmimatya ApaH saMGawwante

'tAMSca sa pratiyuDyanvE yudDe rAjA pravAsitaH' (rA0 17029) pratiyuDyan pratipakzatayA yuDyan (yuDyamAnaH) iti tilakaH pratiSabdasya sArTakatAmanvizyannevamAha tilakakAraH ahaM tu manye pratirupasargaH kevalaM sakarmakatAmApAdayati DAtorarTe tu nAntaraM karoti taTA codAhftiBirvakzyamARABirvyaktaM Bavizyati
'viprarUpaM viDAyedaM manye mAM pratiyuDyase' (BA0 Adi0 19028)
'pratiyodDuM na Sakyo hi mAnuzEriha saMyuge' (BA0 anu0 14831)

'kaTaM BIzmamahaM saMKye droRaM ca maDusUdana izuBiH pratiyotsyAmi' (gItA 24) kevalo yuDirakarmakaH Aha ca vfttikAraH-- yuDirakarmakaH antarBAvitaRyarTaH sakarmako Bavati (pA0 3295 sUtre) pratipakzaBAvastvantareRApi pratiSabdaM gamyata eva
'…DfzwaketuM ca cedipam mAMsaSoRitaBfnmartyaH pratiyuDyeta ko yuDi' (BA0 u0 8013).. pratiyuDyeta (tena) saNgrAmayeta sopasargako yuDiH sakarmakaH
